# MSBuild SDK Expert Skill

This skill covers the MSBuild SDK project experience for pgPacTool, including SDK props/targets,
CLI-host-driven compilation, package layout, restore/load behavior, incremental build semantics,
and verbose diagnostics.

## Use this skill when changing
- `src/sdk/MSBuild.Sdk.PostgreSql/`
- SDK package layout
- SQL discovery behavior
- incremental build inputs/outputs
- Visual Studio load or restore guidance
- SDK docs
